title: Merch Rare Eva Figure
wikitext:
[]: [Merch] Rare Eva Figure?             Quote Post by Bagm » Tue Sep 08, 2015 10:45 pm I was at a con and I bought a Neon Genesis Evangelion 2 blind box PVC. I opened the box but figured I should wait to open the plastic wrapping when I saw it. It's a really well painted Asuka figure but her plugsuit and hair clips were painted with Rei's colours. I know it's not a blatant painting mistake because her hair is orange still and her plugsuit number is still 02. Anyone have any information?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Sep 09, 2015 1:16 am IIRC, the NGE2 figures were made like that to be swappable. Not sure how that fit with the world simulator feeling of the game, but okay then.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Sep 09, 2015 1:25 am Can you post a picture? I'm intrigued.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagm » Sun Oct 04, 2015 5:55 pm Ray wrote: Can you post a picture? I'm intrigued.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 04, 2015 7:04 pm I would bet on that being a bootleg.

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Sun Oct 04, 2015 7:09 pm ^what he said

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 05, 2015 10:18 pm But that's how they were made: Sailor Star Dust wrote: IIRC, the NGE2 figures were made like that to be swappable. Not sure how that fit with the world simulator feeling of the game, but okay then.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagm » Wed Oct 07, 2015 7:18 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I would bet on that being a bootleg.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Oct 07, 2015 4:48 pm Took some Japanese digging, but I found an example of the legit Asuka and Rei NGE2 figures: Asuka http://www.suruga-ya.jp/product/detail/663001689000 Rei http://www.suruga-ya.jp/product/detail/663001687001 "Rebirth Eva, Reboot" is what it says next to their character descriptions. IIRC, Bandai only made the 2 girls and some of the Eva units. No Shinji, etc though the NGE2 game has so many characters you can play as. Though, I don't recall them having the entry plugs when I saw them on a site so many years back. Hm.

I opened the box but figured I should wait to open the plastic wrapping when I saw it. It's a really well painted Asuka figure but her plugsuit and hair clips were painted with Rei's colours. I know it's not a blatant painting mistake because her hair is orange still and her plugsuit number is still 02. Anyone have any information?

Article: Merch Rare Eva Figure
 Took some Japanese digging, but I found an example of the legit Asuka and Rei NGE2 figures: Asuka http://www.suruga-ya.jp/product/detail/663001689000 Rei http://www.suruga-ya.jp/product/detail/663001687001 "Rebirth Eva, Reboot" is what it says next to their character descriptions. IIRC, Bandai only made the 2 girls and some of the Eva units. No Shinji, etc though the NGE2 game has so many characters you can play as. Though, I don't recall them having the entry plugs when I saw them on a site so many years back. Hm.
